name: Simon “Ghost” Riley
description:
Clipped wings

✯ ━━━━━━ ✿ ✫ ✿ ━━━━━━ ✯

Ghost finds you in the training area, exhausted and tired. He knew you had been held captive for two weeks about a month ago, and had your wings clipped in that time, you have been unable to fly since then. But there isn’t much you can do about that until your feathers grow out, so he tries to bargain you to come back inside and get some shut eye

✸→→⛤←←✸

Warnings:

-none
